description: Triggers when the user wants to create or update their product marketing context document, set up foundational positioning, or avoid repeating context across marketing tasks
should_trigger: Help me set up my product marketing context document so I don't repeat myself every time
Create a positioning document for my SaaS tool
I want to define my product's target audience, competitors, and value proposition in one place
Update my marketing context — we just added enterprise features
Draft a product-marketing-context.md from my existing README
I need to capture our customer language and brand voice for the team
What should I include in a product marketing foundation document?
should_not_trigger: Write the copy for my landing page hero section
Set up my email drip campaign
Create a blog post about our latest feature
